contentBlocks.text: Contact The Vault Private Gym | Premium Personal Training in Shoreditch

contentBlocks.html:
We are situated in the heart of Shoreditch. We are five minutes walk from Old Street, Moorgate and Liverpool Street.

If you require further information about any of our services or would like to arrange an appointment, please contact us at jon@thevaultgym.com

The Vault Gym, Lower Ground Floor, Zetland House,
5-25 Scrutton Street, London EC2A 4 HJ

Call Jon on. 078 0313 2428
or the Gym on. 020 7033 9990

seo.title: Contact The Vault Private Gym | Luxury Personal Training Gym in Shoreditch, London
seo.description: Looking for a premium private gym in Central London? The Vault Gym in Shoreditch offers exclusive personal training, just minutes from Old Street, Moorgate and Liverpool Street stations. Contact us today.
